title: AWS IAM policies should limit the scope of permissions given
description: AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) is the service that defines access to AWS resources. One of the core components of IAM is the policy which, when attached to an identity or a resource, defines its permissions. Policies granting permission to an identity (a user, a group or a role) are called identity-based policies.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: AWS IAM policies should limit scope - avoid wildcard (*) permissions.
